title: About Jerome | Jerome Mayhew
meta_description: I'm Jerome Mayhew, and it's an honour to be the Conservative Member of Parliament for Broadland and Fakenham! I'm married to Kate and we have three children.
text_excerpt: About Jerome | Jerome Mayhew Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Jerome News and Speeches In Parliament Surgeries Contact About Jerome Tweet I'm Jerome Mayhew, and it's an honour to be the Conservative Member of Parliament for Broadland and Fakenham! I'm married to Kate and we have three children. My first job was as a Barrister and subsequently I went on to help build ‘Go Ape!’ into a successful tourism business in Norfolk and across the country. In more recent years I have worked in the constituency as a director of an agricultural company, learning about farming and the opportunities that green energy brings to our region. Since entering Parliament I have been using my position as your MP to raise the concerns of constituents with the Government and to argue their case. You can see a selection of my interventions and speeches in the Chamber of the House of Commons in the "In Parliament" section of the website. I am here to help all those that need it. Get in touch through my regular surgeries, via email or by letter. I want to be the voice of Broadland and Fakenham and work to hold the Labour Government to account on behalf of residents across Norfolk.
